title: Lucid Group (LCID) Q4 2024 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Lucid's Q4 2024 earnings call revealed management perspective on full-year 2024 and 2025 outlook. Revenue of $234.5 million beat estimates reflecting strong Q4 demand and Gravity pre-orders. Management discussed Gravity launch success and early customer reception. Discussion of 2025 guidance for 18,000 vehicle production reflected refinement of targets based on market demand. Cost reduction initiatives detailed with goal of narrowing losses over time. Analyst questions focused on profitability timeline, gross margin trajectory, and competitive positioning. CFO commentary addressed balance sheet strength and extended funding runway through PIF support.
